'''鈭歴-k-f''' ('''kasakaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lylas|lylas]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lylas|lylas]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kasakaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisakaf|thisakaf]] || [[word:jisakaf|jisakaf]] || [[word:shisakaf|shisakaf]] || [[word:kisakaf|kisakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusakaf|thuthusakaf]] || [[word:jujusakaf|jujusakaf]] || [[word:shushusakaf|shushusakaf]] || [[word:kukusakaf|kukusakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusakaf|thusakaf]] || [[word:jusakaf|jusakaf]] || [[word:shusakaf|shusakaf]] || [[word:kusakaf|kusakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusakaf|thusakaf]] || [[word:jusakaf|jusakaf]] || [[word:shusakaf|shusakaf]] || [[word:kusakaf|kusakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesakaf|thesakaf]] || [[word:jesakaf|jesakaf]] || [[word:shesakaf|shesakaf]] || [[word:kesakaf|kesakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosakaf|thothosakaf]] || [[word:jojosakaf|jojosakaf]] || [[word:shoshosakaf|shoshosakaf]] || [[word:kokosakaf|kokosakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosakaf|thosakaf]] || [[word:josakaf|josakaf]] || [[word:shosakaf|shosakaf]] || [[word:kosakaf|kosakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosakaf|thosakaf]] || [[word:josakaf|josakaf]] || [[word:shosakaf|shosakaf]] || [[word:kosakaf|kosakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙sakaf|th忙sakaf]] || [[word:j忙sakaf|j忙sakaf]] || [[word:sh忙sakaf|sh忙sakaf]] || [[word:k忙sakaf|k忙sakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasakaf|thathasakaf]] || [[word:jajasakaf|jajasakaf]] || [[word:shashasakaf|shashasakaf]] || [[word:kakasakaf|kakasakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasakaf|thasakaf]] || [[word:jasakaf|jasakaf]] || [[word:shasakaf|shasakaf]] || [[word:kasakaf|kasakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasakaf|thasakaf]] || [[word:jasakaf|jasakaf]] || [[word:shasakaf|shasakaf]] || [[word:kasakaf|kasakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasakaf|shasakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasakaf|goshasakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasakaf|gokishasakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasakafn眉|shasakafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasakafnkn眉|goshasakafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakafn眉|gokishasakafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasakafsh毛|shasakafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasakafnksh毛|goshasakafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasakafsh毛|gokishasakafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakafro|shasakafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakafnkro|goshasakafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakafro|gokishasakafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakafmu|shasakafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakafnkmu|goshasakafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakafmu|gokishasakafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasakafsher|shasakafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasakafnksher|goshasakafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasakafsher|gokishasakafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasakafng|shasakafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasakafnkng|goshasakafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasakafng|gokishasakafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasakafya|shasakafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasakafnkya|goshasakafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasakafya|gokishasakafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasakafyam|shasakafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasakafnkyam|goshasakafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasakafyam|gokishasakafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasakafn眉sh毛|shasakafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasakafnkn眉sh毛|goshasakafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasakafn眉sh毛|gokishasakafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakafn眉ro|shasakafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakafnkn眉ro|goshasakafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakafn眉ro|gokishasakafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakafn眉mu|shasakafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakafnkn眉mu|goshasakafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakafn眉mu|gokishasakafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasakafsh毛n眉|shasakafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasakafnksh毛n眉|goshasakafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakafsh毛n眉|gokishasakafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakafsh毛ro|shasakafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakafnksh毛ro|goshasakafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakafsh毛ro|gokishasakafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakafsh毛mu|shasakafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakafnksh毛mu|goshasakafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakafsh毛mu|gokishasakafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasakafron眉|shasakafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasakafnkron眉|goshasakafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakafron眉|gokishasakafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasakafrosh毛|shasakafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasakafnkrosh毛|goshasakafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasakafrosh毛|gokishasakafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasakafromu|shasakafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasakafnkromu|goshasakafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasakafromu|gokishasakafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasakafmun眉|shasakafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasakafnkmun眉|goshasakafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasakafmun眉|gokishasakafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasakafmush毛|shasakafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasakafnkmush毛|goshasakafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasakafmush毛|gokishasakafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasakafmuro|shasakafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasakafnkmuro|goshasakafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasakafmuro|gokishasakafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
